case_title: DEENNA L WHITE VS. ST. VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITE, DEENNA L ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF DEENNA L. WHITE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ST VINCENT DE PAUL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SHARI P. WOOLDRIDGE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR AND ULISES ZATARAIN DIRECTOR OF PROGRAM OPERATIONS (SVDP BROUGHT 3 WITNESS). PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED IN CASE 19-860614 FOR CASES19-860613 & 19-860614 & 19-860616. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHITE, DEENNA L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ST. VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
